title: 1970 Chevrolet Nova Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this medium 1970 Chevrolet Nova coloring sheet. High-resolution free printable PDF showing a classic Chevy muscle car parked in front of a garage.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The minimalist, understated design of the Chevrolet Nova earned it a reputation as a 'sleeper'—a car that was much faster than it looked.
The Chevrolet Chevrolet Nova was a popular compact muscle car, widely customized for drag racing due to its light body and V8 power options.
